hooks.command: if command -v node >/dev/null 2>&1; then node ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/session-start-hook.js; else echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"SessionStart","additionalContext":"ACTION REQUIRED: The OrbCode plugin requires Node.js but it is NOT installed or NOT in PATH. IMPORTANT: You MUST immediately inform the user that Node.js >= 20 is required. Direct them to install it from https://nodejs.org/ and restart Claude Code."}}'; fi
